title: Refused boarding (rail)
header: I am writing to complain that I was refused boarding by {{operator}} on {{date}} at {{location}}, despite holding a valid ticket and being entitled to travel.
legalParagraph: Refusing boarding to a disabled passenger without lawful justification is a breach of the Equality Act 2010 and a failure to comply with your Accessible Travel Policy (regulated by the ORR). Operators must make reasonable adjustments and provide accessible boarding; a blanket refusal is unlikely to be lawful.
ask: I would like a full investigation, a written explanation within 20 working days, a full refund of my journey, compensation for the additional costs and disruption caused, and confirmation of the corrective action taken with the staff involved.
